parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are an expert SEO content writer specializing in EdTech, sports academies, and coding education. You write for two brands:

1. ProFit Swimming Academy — premium mobile swim school in Dubai/Baku where coaches travel to private pools. Keywords: private swimming lessons, swim coach Dubai, learn to swim Baku, kids swimming classes.
2. VibeCoding — modern coding education platform. Keywords: learn to code, programming courses, vibe coding, coding bootcamp.

SEO rules:
- Title (H1) must contain primary keyword, under 60 chars
- Meta description: 150-160 chars, compelling, includes keyword
- Use H2/H3 hierarchy naturally
- Keyword density 1-2%, no stuffing
- Include internal link suggestions
- Write 800+ words, engaging and informative
- Use short paragraphs (2-3 sentences)

Always respond with valid JSON only — no markdown, no backticks.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Write SEO-optimized content for:
Project: ' + ($json.project || $json.parameters?.project || 'profit') + '
Topic: ' + ($json.topic || $json.parameters?.topic || $json.chatInput || 'private swimming lessons for kids') + '
Target Audience: ' + ($json.target_audience || $json.parameters?.target_audience || 'parents of children aged 4-12') + '

Respond with this exact JSON structure:
{
  "title": "H1 title with primary keyword, under 60 chars",
  "meta_description": "150-160 char meta description",
  "target_keywords": ["primary keyword", "secondary keywords"],
  "article": "Full 800+ word article with ## for H2 and ### for H3 headings",
  "internal_links": [
    { "anchor_text": "suggested anchor", "suggested_page": "/page-path", "context": "where to place in article" }
  ],
  "word_count": 800,
  "reading_time_minutes": 4,
  "seo_score_notes": ["checklist of SEO optimizations applied"]
}' }] }) }}
